    <content type="html"><p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 7</var>, <var data-var='time'>23:46</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Resolved</strong> - This issue has been resolved. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 7</var>, <var data-var='time'>23:19</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Monitoring</strong> - We are continuing to monitor issues affecting requests to some models, and have once again seen success rates return to normal. We are working to ensure there are no further issues, and will provide an additional update shortly. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 7</var>, <var data-var='time'>21:47</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Update</strong> - We are continuing to work to resolve an issue resulting in elevated errors on requests to some models, primarily Claude Fable 5. We will provide an additional update as soon as possible. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 7</var>, <var data-var='time'>20:28</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Identified</strong> - We have seen success rates return to normal, but we are continuing to work to fully resolve this issue and ensure no further recurrences. </p> <p> <small>Jul <var data-var='date'> 7</var>, <var data-var='time'>20:02</var> UTC</small><br> <strong>Investigating</strong> - We are investigating elevated errors on requests to some models. We will provide an update as soon as possible. </p></content>
